epics.description:
Initialize team planning work for {{quarter_human}}.

Acceptance criteria:
- Scope is reviewed with engineering and product.
- Recurring dependencies are confirmed.
- Child tasks are completed or explicitly deferred.

tasks.description: Review unresolved items from the previous quarter and decide whether each item should move into {{quarter_human}}, be closed, or be split.
Confirm quarter roadmap scope with product, support, and operations stakeholders.

epics.description: Prepare recurring operational readiness checks for {{quarter_human}}.

tasks.description: Review dashboard coverage, alert thresholds, ownership, and runbook links for core services.
Check expected traffic, platform constraints, capacity, and high-availability assumptions for the quarter.
